mapper.select: SELECT A.ROLE_CODE as roleCode, A.ROLE_NM as roleNm, A.ROLE_PTTRN as rolePtn, A.ROLE_DC as roleDc, A.ROLE_TY as roleTyp, A.ROLE_SORT as roleSort, B.AUTHOR_CODE as authorCode, DATE_FORMAT(B.CREAT_DT,'%Y-%m-%d') as creatDt, (CASE WHEN B.ROLE_CODE IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS regYn FROM LETTNROLEINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT AUTHOR_CODE , ROLE_CODE, CREAT_DT FROM LETTNAUTHORROLERELATE WHERE AUTHOR_CODE = #{searchKeyword}) B ON A.ROLE_CODE = B.ROLE_CODE LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM LETTNROLEINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT AUTHOR_CODE , ROLE_CODE, CREAT_DT FROM LETTNAUTHORROLERELATE WHERE AUTHOR_CODE = #{searchKeyword}) B ON A.ROLE_CODE = B.ROLE_CODE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LETTNAUTHORROLERELATE ( AUTHOR_CODE , ROLE_CODE , CREAT_DT) VALUES ( #{authorCode} , #{roleCode} , now())
